message:
Add dcg and tru to auto-update workflow

Extends scheduled version checking and update-manifest.sh to handle
destructive_command_guard (dcg) and toon_rust (tru) releases.
GoReleaser-managed tools (bv, caam, slb, ntm) excluded as they auto-push.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,13 +9,15 @@ on:
   workflow_dispatch:
     inputs:
       tool:
-        description: "Tool to update (cass, xf, cm)"
+        description: "Tool to update (cass, xf, cm, dcg, tru)"
         required: true
         type: choice
         options:
           - cass
           - xf
           - cm
+          - dcg
+          - tru
       version:
         description: "Version to update to (e.g., 0.1.56)"
         required: true
@@ -81,6 +83,12 @@ jobs:
             cm)
               CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system/releases/download/v${VERSION}/cass-memory-windows-x64.exe.sha256" | cut -d' ' -f1)
               ;;
+            dcg)
+              CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard/releases/download/v${VERSION}/dcg-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip.sha256" | cut -d' ' -f1)
+              ;;
+            tru)
+              CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v${VERSION}/toon-windows-amd64.zip.sha256" | cut -d' ' -f1)
+              ;;
           esac
 
           echo "New checksum: $CHECKSUM"
@@ -122,6 +130,10 @@ jobs:
             repo: Dicklesworthstone/xf
           - tool: cm
             repo: Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system
+          - tool: dcg
+            repo: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
+          - tool: tru
+            repo: Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
@@ -187,6 +199,12 @@ jobs:
             cm)
               CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system/releases/download/v${VERSION}/cass-memory-windows-x64.exe.sha256" | cut -d' ' -f1)
               ;;
+            dcg)
+              CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard/releases/download/v${VERSION}/dcg-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip.sha256" | cut -d' ' -f1)
+              ;;
+            tru)
+              CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v${VERSION}/toon-windows-amd64.zip.sha256" | cut -d' ' -f1)
+              ;;
           esac
 
           echo "New checksum: $CHECKSUM"

@@ -46,9 +46,23 @@ case "$TOOL" in
     CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "$CHECKSUM_URL" | cut -d' ' -f1)
     ;;
 
+  dcg)
+    URL="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard/releases/download/v${VERSION}/dcg-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip"
+    CHECKSUM_URL="${URL}.sha256"
+    echo "Fetching checksum..."
+    CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "$CHECKSUM_URL" | cut -d' ' -f1)
+    ;;
+
+  tru)
+    URL="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust/releases/download/v${VERSION}/toon-windows-amd64.zip"
+    CHECKSUM_URL="${URL}.sha256"
+    echo "Fetching checksum..."
+    CHECKSUM=$(curl -sL "$CHECKSUM_URL" | cut -d' ' -f1)
+    ;;
+
   *)
     echo "Error: Unknown tool or tool not available for Windows: $TOOL"
-    echo "Supported tools: cass, xf, cm"
+    echo "Supported tools: cass, xf, cm, dcg, tru"
     exit 1
     ;;
 esac
